issues.summary: AON7544 schematic symbol has 3 pins; footprint has 8 pads + EP — verify multi-pad bonding in layout.
issues.description: The schematic uses a generic FET-NCH symbol (D/S/G only). The board export lists pads 1-8 plus EP. If the symbol-to-footprint pin map is wrong, only one source pad and one drain pad will be netted. RDS(on) and θJA degrade 4-5×.

evidence.label: Pins 1, 2, 3
evidence.design: tied to GND polygon — verify in layout

evidence.label: Pins 5, 6, 7, 8
evidence.design: tied to M- polygon — verify in layout

evidence.label: Exposed pad
evidence.design: EP split into pads 9/9_1/9_2 in board export

evidence.note: Gate-source pulldown R9 = 22 k present (SCH_FET_001 satisfied).

recommended_actions: Open the layout and confirm pads 1/2/3 all sit on the GND polygon.
Confirm pads 5/6/7/8 and the EP all sit on the M- polygon with thermal vias to inner copper.
If the footprint pin map is wrong, regenerate from a verified library before fab.

issues.summary: PS_SW trace on L1 crosses a keepout in the L2 GND reference plane — return-path discontinuity.
issues.description: The PS_SW net is routed on L1 Top. Stackup confirms L2 GND is the adjacent reference plane (copper_stack[1], position 'inner'). A 1.2 mm restrict zone on L2 directly under the SW trace forces the return current to detour around the keepout, increasing loop area and broadband emissions.

evidence.label: Adjacent reference plane to L1 Top
Keepout under SW trace
evidence.source: exports/sample_brd-img-cu-L2-GND.png — keepout visible 4 mm SW of U2 pad 1

evidence.note: PS_SW trace path on L1 confirmed visually.

recommended_actions: Reroute the PS_SW net to avoid the L2 keepout, or remove the keepout if its purpose no longer applies.
If the keepout is intentional (e.g., antenna clearance), move PS_SW to a layer with an unbroken reference plane.

verified_checks.summary: L2 saturation margin ≥1.6× against MT3608 4 A switch limit.
verified_checks.description: Sunltech SLO0630H220MTT spec confirms Isat 3.2 A (20 % L drop) and Idc 3.0 A (40 °C rise). Realistic peak inductor current at 5 V→9 V for sub-1 A motor load is 1-2 A.

cross_checks.summary: MT3608 boost layout vs. datasheet recommendations — mostly conforms.
cross_checks.description: Cross-checks the boost converter layout against the MT3608 datasheet's recommended layout (page 6, Figure 3) and stress against absolute-max ratings (pages 2-3).

evidence.label: Cout near diode cathode
evidence.design: C4 at ~2.5 mm from D3 cathode

evidence.label: FB components close to IC
evidence.design: R3 at 3.8 mm from FB pad
